description_long: This wardrobe features a modern, minimalist design with a combination of light beige and wood finishes. The front consists of three large, flat panel doors with subtle vertical grooves, framed by a natural wood border. On one side, there is an open section with vertical wooden slats, hooks for hanging items, and a cushioned bench in a contrasting brown color, as well as a shelf above for additional storage. The wardrobe's structure appears robust, with clean lines and a mix of closed and open storage spaces. The materials suggest a blend of engineered wood, laminate, and possibly some metal for the hooks. The overall look is functional yet stylish, suitable for urban entryways or hallways.
description: A modern wardrobe with three panel doors, wood accents, and an open side section featuring hooks, a bench, and a shelf. The design combines beige panels with natural wood and a brown cushioned seat.
description_view_0: Side view showing the vertical wooden slats and part of the open storage section.
description_view_1: Angled view revealing the open section with hooks, bench, shelf, and the full front panel doors.
description_view_2: Opposite side view highlighting the wood grain side panel and partial view of the open section.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the plain, flat back panels and the wood frame.
